rows.notes: Page title at top center; fully legible. Used as structural header.
Clear handwriting for description and numbers. Column boundaries established from total row (row 29) and projected up; pounds/shillings/pence align well and all values fall within valid ranges.
Description mostly legible. Numbers align with projected columns but pence digit has slight smearing; read as '8' based on vertical alignment with total row boundaries.
Shillings '18' and pence '0' clearly written and align with column rules; description similar to previous line and legible.
Description ('Coll Omn: Division') and numeric columns are clear. Vertical alignment validated against total row; currency values valid.
Description and amounts legible. Pounds column shows '0' clearly; shillings/pence align with column guides from row 29.
Handwriting clear for both description and numerals; alignment with total row is unambiguous and values are within valid ranges.
Description and '0/14/0' amounts are clearly written and align with established column boundaries determined from row 29.
Short description and small amounts are legible; pence '8' and shilling '1' well aligned with the pence and shilling columns derived from row 29.

rows.description: Boxur: Kidding: J. Newington x Merch.
rows.notes: Description is legible though crowded. Pounds and shillings align clearly; pence digit is partially smudged and could be '11' or '9' — chosen '11' based on vertical placement relative to row 29 column guides.
Description mostly readable. Numeric columns align with row-29 guides; pence '4' faint but consistent with neighboring entries.
Entry text short; pounds '2' and pence '4' are clearly written and align correctly with the projected columns.
Description a little uncertain (reads as 'Lohia'); numeric values read as 1/6/8 and align with column guides, but the last pence digit has minor ambiguity.
Description and amounts clear. Pence '0' explicitly marked; vertical alignment consistent with total row columns.

Left-hand description partially visible but the monetary columns in this band are moderately obscured by ink bleed from the reverse (page-specific guidance). Amounts unreadable; left blank per guidance.
Description visible but faint; numeric columns in this area affected by bleed. Per page guidance rows 15-28 are moderately obscured; amounts left blank and confidence low.

This line is a continuation of the previous description (continuation line). Page guidance notes row 17 is a continuation but has its own amount; however the numeric columns here are obscured by bleed and could not be read reliably — left blank.
Short description visible but ink bleed obscures monetary figures in this region; amounts left blank per page guidance.
Description readable but numeric columns in this band are affected by reverse-side ink bleed; amounts illegible so left blank.
Description legible; amounts obscured by bleed and not recoverable with confidence — left blank per instructions for rows 15-28.
Left description visible but monetary columns are faint/obscured; amounts omitted per page-specific guidance.
Entry text faint but readable; amounts in the three money columns are heavily affected by bleed and cannot be read reliably — left blank.
Description visible; monetary values in this section are obscured by ink bleed on reverse. Per instruction, leave amounts blank and set low confidence.
Short label readable; numeric columns are unclear due to bleed and shadowing. Amounts omitted per page guidance.
Long description visible but the monetary area is heavily obscured. According to page guidance this region's amounts are unreliable; left blank.
Continuation line of prior row (page guidance states row 26 is a continuation with its own amount). However the money columns here are obscured by reverse-side ink bleed; left blank per instructions.
Description readable but monetary figures not legible due to ink bleed and shadow; amounts intentionally left blank following page-specific guidance.

rows.description: Plate excise due Lady day last
rows.notes: This final pre-total line's description appears clearly but the amount column just to its right is obscured by bleed/shadow. Page instruction: rows 15-28 amounts unreadable → left blank.

Total row clearly written as '100 / 2 / 11 1/2' and was used to establish the precise vertical column boundaries for the whole page. Pence fraction read as '1/2' (interpreted as 0.5). Values validate against currency rules.
